commands.speaker: Narrator
commands.text: The first class of the day begins. The classroom is filled with the murmur of students chatting.

commands.speaker: {player_name}
commands.text: This place feels different from my old school. Everyone seems so focused.

commands.speaker: {player_name}
commands.text: Absolutely! Let's sit in the back row.

commands.speaker: Niem
commands.text: The cafeteria food here is actually pretty good!

commands.speaker: {player_name}
commands.text: I'll take your word for it. What's on the menu today?

commands.speaker: Niem
commands.text: They have that special curry everyone talks about. Want to try it?

commands.speaker: {player_name}
commands.text: Alright, I'm feeling adventurous today. Let's do it!

commands.speaker: Niem
commands.text: That's the spirit! I'll get us both a bowl.

commands.speaker: {player_name}
commands.text: I think I'll wait for dinner. Not very hungry right now.

commands.speaker: Niem
commands.text: No problem! More for me then!

commands.speaker: Narrator
commands.text: After classes, {player_name} heads to the rooftop to get some fresh air.

commands.speaker: {player_name}
commands.text: First day at Sakura Academy... It's been quite eventful.

commands.speaker: {player_name}
commands.text: I wonder what tomorrow will bring.

commands.speaker: Narrator
commands.text: The sun begins to set, casting a warm orange glow over the horizon.

commands.speaker: Narrator
commands.text: A new chapter in {player_name}'s life has only just begun...
